closing.summary: Ground Flaxseed has a genuinely strong overall case, especially tiny food with serious nutrient density and easy to sprinkle into meals. the downsides are there, but calorie density still stacks up fast and real serving sizes are often small do not outweigh the upside. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
